title: stipa occidentalis var. montana
intro: Stipa occidentalis var. montana, also known as mountain big blue grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This perennial grass has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and reducing pain. The health benefits of Stipa occidentalis var. montana include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and alleviate pain, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
